message:
fix: Resolve CI failures from dependency updates

- Fix rand 0.9 API breaking changes:
  - Use rand::distr::Alphanumeric instead of rand::distributions
  - Update rand::thread_rng() to rand::rng()
  - Update rng.gen() to rng.random()
  - Add type annotation for u8 to char conversion

- Fix nested tokio runtime panic in TUI query:
  - Use tokio::task::block_in_place to safely bridge sync/async
  - Prevents panic when calling block_on from within async context

- Add StorageError::NotFound variant:
  - Required for account management error handling
  - Update error_renderer.rs error code mapping (WA-2040)
  - Add remediation guidance for NotFound errors

- Fix main.rs import scope issue:
  - Move MigrationStatusReport and MigrationPlan to module-level imports

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
